Interface IAttachmentInfo

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Provides access to members that describe an attachment.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("74060067-8955-44DA-8653-C18F388893CE")]
public interface IAttachmentInfo

Properties

AttachmentID

ID that uniquely identifies an attachment.

long AttachmentID { get; }

Property Value

long

Examples

Sample Snippet

ContentType

Content type that indicates the type of the mime content.

string ContentType { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

GlobalID

Global ID that uniquely identifies the attachment.

string GlobalID { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

IsAttachmentRelationshipGlobalIDBased

Is the attachment global ID based.

bool IsAttachmentRelationshipGlobalIDBased { get; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

Name

Descriptive name of an attachment.

string Name { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

ParentGlobalID

The source global ID that to which the attachment is associated to.

string ParentGlobalID { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

ParentID

The source ID that to which the attachment is associated to.

long ParentID { get; set; }

Property Value

long

Examples

Sample Snippet

Size

The size of the attachment.

int Size { get; }

Property Value

int

Examples

Sample Snippet

Value[esriAttachmentTableField]

put a value in a member of the attachemnt using name.

object Value[esriAttachmentTableField key] { get; set; }

Parameters

key esriAttachmentTableField
